title: Configure cross-account ECR access
scenario: 🔥 A workload in AWS account 999888777666 is getting `ImagePullBackOff` pulling from ECR in account 123456789012. The ECR repository policy has no cross-account statement. Fix the policy ConfigMap to allow the workload account to pull images.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: ecr-cross-account-policy
  namespace: default
data:
  policy.json: |
    {
      "Version": "2012-10-17",
      "Statement": []
    }

objectives.description: Principal contains a valid AWS account ARN

hints.text: An ECR repository policy works like an S3 bucket policy — it grants access to AWS accounts/roles. Add a Statement that allows `ecr:BatchGetImage`, `ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer`, and `ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability` for the workload account.
The workload account is `999888777666`. The Principal should be `arn:aws:iam::999888777666:root` to allow all IAM principals in that account.
